criteria.reason: Apify run usage fields are propagated from ProspectingService into worker debug payload.
Worker can locate a reserved map refresh reservation by metadata.parsequeue_id without schema changes.
Settlement is gated by Apify source, actual provider cost, queue identity, and matching reservation.
Missing cost/reservation skips settlement, and worker uses a savepoint around settlement.
No paid refresh enqueue, UI trigger, external write, or publication path was added.
